title: Healthcheck and Export Registrant Flow
flow_A_healthcheck: Router: check req.app.get('isDraining') → if true, return 503 {ok:false, failed:['draining']}
Router: isHostedDomainRequest(req) → if true, call next() (skip health response)
#getStaleHealthRunnerFailure(): compare now vs last_check_cycle_completed_at_ against stale threshold (3×5s=15s)
flow_B_export_registrant_startup: ServiceManager.register: await setTimeout(0) [yield to event loop]
ServiceManager: factory.create({parameters, context}) → Service.create() → new ExportRegistrantService()
ServiceManager: push entry {name, instance, status:'registering'} to services_l_ / services_m_
maybe_init_: entry.instance.as(TService).get_depends() → reads constructor.DEPENDS ?? [] (ExportRegistrantService has none declared)
ExportRegistrantService._init(): console.log(Spinner) [force Spinner import; prevents tree-shaking]
init_service_: check waiting_[name] → notify any dependent services via maybe_init_
init_service_: iterate init_listeners_ and call each listener [unblocks aget() callers]
flow_C_periodic_health_checks: #initDefaultChecks: add_check('database-liveness', fn) if database service present
each interval: for each {name, fn} in checks_: Promise.race([fn(), timeout(4s)])
on check failure: svc_alarm.create('health-check-failure', ...) if not already failing; run on_fail_ handlers
after all checks: update this.failures_, this.stats_
key_relationships: AdvancedBase → Service (putility concepts.Service, implements TService trait)
Service (putility) → Service (gui definitions.js, adds .services binding in init())
AdvancedBase → ServiceManager (extends, uses TService trait to call init/get_depends on service instances)
BaseService → ServerHealthService (backend, extends, adds health check loop)
ServiceManager depends_on TService trait (symbol) to orchestrate init lifecycle
ServerHealthService depends_on KVCache (kv singleton) for caching get_status() responses
healthcheck.js depends_on req.services (ServiceLocator) to get 'server-health' service
important_notes: TService is a Symbol-keyed trait; .as(TService) is resolved via AdvancedBase's TraitsFeature
TService.get_depends() reads constructor.DEPENDS (static) merged with instance get_depends() override
ServiceManager uses 'pending' status + waiting_ map to handle dependency ordering at startup
ExportRegistrantService._init() sole purpose: force import of Spinner (bundle optimizer side-effect guard)
healthcheck router skips health check for hosted-domain requests (static/app hosting domains) and calls next()
get_status() cache TTL=5s; stale health loop threshold=15s (3×CHECK_INTERVAL_MS); draining check bypasses cache
send_health_status can return HTTP 500 only when query param ?return-http-error is set or fail_with_http_error=true
ServerHealthService.__on_ready.webserver hook registers web/socketio checks after web server starts
